{{Infobox character
| name = Rosephus
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Champion
| abilities = create spectral weapons, Soulbound power
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

''See also: [[Rosephus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Rosephus is one of two Imperialist [[Champions]] known to have escaped the [[Gardeners]]. Though he possesses a physique similar in size to an average man, he is heavily muscled and possesses superhuman physical strength. He is a formidable combatant who carries numerous blades, including multiple swords strapped to his body and daggers. His abilities include a [[Soulbound Vessel]] that manifests as several floating, ghostly red daggers above his head. In combat, he is characterized by an aggressive and loud nature, often shouting challenges or roaring questions. He has demonstrated high battle instincts and the ability to move with great force, such as leaping across rooms or charging through doors. During confrontations, he has shown a cruel temperament and an interest in using captives to ensure future compliance.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Rosephus is a [[Champion]] with a muscular build similar to an [[Izyrian]] statue, bearing a shallow cut over one eyebrow and carrying [[the Emperor]]'s full-face helmet. He keeps three swords buckled to the right side of his hip and possesses a [[sword]] that he spins in place. Through his blue [[Soulbound Vessel]], he can create spectral weapons, specifically manifesting daggers of red light that hover over his head. During the events described, [[Tyria]] calls out to him, and he questions which members of the group are [[Readers]]. Additionally, [[Petal]] commands Rosephus to seal a door.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]] is a [[Champion]] who is muscled like an [[Izyrian]] statue and carries many weapons.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]] carries three swords buckled to the right side of his hip.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]] is a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]] is a [[Champion]] whose [[Vessel]] allows him to create spectral weapons.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]]'s [[Soulbound Vessel]] creates daggers of red light that float over his head.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]]'s [[Soulbound Vessel]] is described as a blue [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]] possesses a [[sword]] that he spins in place.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]] uses red daggers that hover over him.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] called out to [[Rosephus]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]] carries [[the Emperor]]'s full-face helmet.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]] has a shallow cut over one eyebrow.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]] asks who among the group are [[Readers]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rosephus]] is someone [[Petal]] commands to seal a door.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Rosephus]] was destroying walls in a rage to find someone.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Rosephus]] uses a [[sword]] in each hand and has three ghostly red daggers as his [[Soulbound]] power.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Northwest corner, Rosephus,” she called back.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Rosephus! Seal the door! Nobody gets in!”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
